results.rendered_html: naśvara (von 1. naś) adj. f. ī  P. 3,2,163 .  VOP. 26,157 . vergehend, vergänglich: (lakṣmīḥ) jalāpātatuṣārakaṇanaśvarī  KATHĀS. 19,50 .  BHĀG. P. 5,18,4 . kimetairātmanastucchaiḥ saha dehena naśvaraiḥ . anarthaiḥ 7,7,45 . anaśvara unvergänglich  BHARTṚ. 3,21 . naśvaratva n. Vergänglichkeit: arthānām  DAŚAK. _in_ BENF. Chr. 185,15 .

results.rendered_html:
naśvara a. (rī f.) [naś-kvarap]
1 Perishable, transitory, evanescent, transient, frail; nikhilaṃ jagadeva naśvaraṃ  R. G. 
2 Destructive, mischievous.
